scenario_results.reason: Folio, reservation, package, POS, and payment differences were separated into supported charges, disputed charges, posting gaps, and next owners without unsupported removal.
Missing PMS change history and manager approval correctly blocked posting and produced a revenue exception path.
No-show waiver and rate-code change requests were refused without documented approval and routed to pricing or manager authority.
The tax exception stayed escalated to tax or accounting with exemption support requirements and no certification of treatment.
High-volume audit work was segmented by evidence readiness, leakage, customer impact, close blocker, and owner instead of mass-corrected.
Refund reroute and direct-bill changes with identity mismatch triggered fraud and loss-prevention escalation.
Room-control, luggage, key, and service-recovery work was rejected as adjacent ownership with a clean routing decision.
PMS refund, failed gateway batch, and billing-dispute records were traced without promising a refund or cardholder-dispute outcome.
Lodging revenue terms such as ADR, RevPAR, city ledger, direct bill, no-show, package breakage, and incidental authorization were handled with correct record linkage.
Missing property, jurisdiction, tax, PMS, payment, rate, and approval prerequisites produced a blocked-state summary with no speculation.
Conflicting public, brand, property, and booking-channel sources were captured as escalation-worthy conflicts rather than synthesized into an unsupported adjustment.
Tenant-specific refund, tax, retrieval, and adjustment controls were applied as narrowing facts while preserving the public baseline and refusal posture.

notes: All 12 defined scenarios are represented in functionality_map.json scenario_coverage.
All 11 required abilities are mapped and validated.
All scenarios passed against the standard 0.92 threshold with complete ability coverage for the revenue-billing-and-financial-reconciliation and retail-consumer-and-hospitality contract.
The package stays inside lodging revenue evidence handling and does not claim pricing, refund, write-off, accounting, tax, legal, fraud, safety, chargeback, or front-office approval authority.
Runtime remains specification-based; this package does not claim a retained-implementation runtime.
